title: RS-232C Software Configuration
description:
RS-232C Software Configuration

RS-232C Software Configuration

To configure a Windows Part RS-232C port

In
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Setup]-[System Configuration]and display
	 the [System Configuration] dialog box.

Select [Controller]-[RS-232]-[PC].

Set
	 the [Enabled] check box.

Change
	 the settings as desired.

Click
	 the [Apply] button. The new settingsaresaved.

Click
	 the [Close] button.

If several ports are used for communication at one time with more than a 19200 baud rate, error 2929 or 2922 may occur. In this case, select a lower baud rate or avoid using several ports at one time.

To configure a standard / option RS-232C port

In
	 the Epson RC+ 8.0 menu, select [Setup]-[System Configuration] and
	 display the [SystemConfiguration] dialog box.

Select
	 [Controller]-[RS-232]-[CU].

Select
	 a port to configure.

Change
	 the settings as desired.

Click
	 the [Apply] button. The new settings are saved.

Click
	 the [Close] button.
